name: phase-lockdown
description: Verify non-current-phase storylets are filtered out

steps.comment: Phase 0 storylet selected (only phase 0 candidates available)
Day 2: transition to phase 1 (phase 0 candidates now locked out)
Phase 1 only storylet executed (confirms phase 0 candidates locked)
Phase lockdown verified: no phase bleed; each phase executes only its own candidates
